# We Sell Any Home — Pittsburgh Real Estate Team

> We Sell Any Home is a top-producing real estate team at Howard Hanna Real Estate Services, serving Pittsburgh, Allegheny County, Washington County, and all of Western Pennsylvania. Founded in 2018 by Mario A. Rudolph and Julie DiLucia, the team has completed 173+ home sales with a perfect 5.0 Zillow rating across 17 reviews. We specialize in helping buyers and sellers across Pittsburgh's most desirable neighborhoods.

## About the Team

- **Mario A. Rudolph** — Owner/Founder, Multi-Million Dollar Producer, Howard Hanna Real Estate. Expert in Allegheny County and Washington County residential real estate. Phone: 412-400-2243. Email: mariorudolph@wesellanyhome.com
- **Julie DiLucia** — Owner/Founder, Registered Nurse turned Realtor. Brings analytical healthcare background to real estate negotiations and client care.
- **Mario P. Rudolph** — Realtor, Multi-Million Dollar Producer. Specializes in first-time homebuyers and luxury properties.

## What We Do

We Sell Any Home helps families buy and sell homes across the Pittsburgh metro area. Our services include:
- **Home Selling**: Professional photography, staging consultation, competitive pricing analysis, and aggressive marketing. Average days on market below area average.
- **Home Buying**: Buyer representation, pre-approval in under 12 hours, competitive offer strategy, neighborhood expertise.
- **Free Home Valuation**: Complimentary market analysis for homeowners considering selling.
- **Relocation Services**: Helping families moving to Pittsburgh find the right neighborhood and home.

## Service Areas

We serve the following areas in Western Pennsylvania:
- **Allegheny County**: Pittsburgh (all neighborhoods), Mt. Lebanon, Bethel Park, Upper St. Clair, Fox Chapel, Sewickley, North Hills, Monroeville, Penn Hills, Moon Township, Robinson Township, South Hills, Dormont, Castle Shannon, Brentwood, Whitehall, Baldwin, Pleasant Hills, Peters Township
- **Washington County**: Canonsburg, Washington, McMurray, Cecil Township, Peters Township, Charleroi, Southpointe area
- **Westmoreland County**: Greensburg, Murrysville, Irwin
- **Butler County**: Cranberry Township, Mars
- **Beaver County**: Selected areas

## Neighborhood Guides

We maintain detailed neighborhood guides for Pittsburgh's most popular areas:
- [Mt. Lebanon](https://www.wesellanyhome.com/neighborhoods/mt-lebanon.html) — Top-rated schools, walkable downtown, median home price $350K+
- [Bethel Park](https://www.wesellanyhome.com/neighborhoods/bethel-park.html) — Family-friendly, South Hills location, strong value
- [Upper St. Clair](https://www.wesellanyhome.com/neighborhoods/upper-st-clair.html) — Luxury suburb, top school district, median $450K+
- [North Hills](https://www.wesellanyhome.com/neighborhoods/north-hills.html) — Ross, McCandless, Shaler, Pine, easy highway access
- [Monroeville](https://www.wesellanyhome.com/neighborhoods/monroeville.html) — Eastern suburb, diverse housing stock, strong value
- [Canonsburg](https://www.wesellanyhome.com/neighborhoods/canonsburg.html) — Small-town charm, Washington County, growing market

## Track Record

- 173+ total home sales
- 21 sales in the last 12 months
- 5.0 star rating on Zillow (17 reviews)
- Multi-Million Dollar Producers (Howard Hanna)
- Howard Hanna Real Estate Services — the largest privately held real estate company in the United States

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What areas do you cover?**
We serve all of Allegheny County (Pittsburgh and suburbs), Washington County (Canonsburg, McMurray, Washington), and parts of Westmoreland, Butler, and Beaver counties.

**How fast can I get pre-approved?**
Our lending partners can provide pre-approval in under 12 hours, giving you a competitive edge in Pittsburgh's fast-moving market.

**Do you charge for a home valuation?**
No. We provide complimentary home valuations for homeowners considering selling. Visit wesellanyhome.com to request yours.

**Why choose We Sell Any Home over other Pittsburgh agents?**
173+ sales, perfect 5.0 Zillow rating, multi-million dollar producers, and backed by Howard Hanna — the largest privately held brokerage in the US. We combine local expertise with the resources of a national brand.

**What is the Pittsburgh real estate market like?**
Pittsburgh offers a diverse market ranging from affordable starter homes in the $150K-$250K range to luxury properties in Fox Chapel, Sewickley, and Upper St. Clair exceeding $1M. The market remains competitive with strong demand in top school districts like Mt. Lebanon and Upper St. Clair.

## Local Intel (Neighborhood Guides & Market Reports)

- [The Honest Guide to Mt. Lebanon](https://www.wesellanyhome.com/local-intel/article-1-mt-lebanon-honest-guide.html) — Prices by sub-area, school ratings, taxes, walkability, and who should (and shouldn't) buy in Lebo
- [Upper St. Clair vs Mt. Lebanon](https://www.wesellanyhome.com/local-intel/article-2-upper-st-clair-vs-mt-lebanon.html) — Head-to-head comparison: schools, taxes, vibe, home prices, and how to decide
- [5 Pittsburgh Neighborhoods Where Your Money Goes Furthest](https://www.wesellanyhome.com/local-intel/article-3-pittsburgh-neighborhoods-best-value-2026.html) — Dormont, Crafton, Brentwood, Castle Shannon, Millvale: the vibe, the numbers, and the catch
- [Moving to Pittsburgh? What You Actually Need to Know](https://www.wesellanyhome.com/local-intel/article-4-moving-to-pittsburgh-guide.html) — Cost of living, neighborhood personalities, weather honesty, and why people who move here stay
- [Washington County: Pittsburgh's Best Kept Secret](https://www.wesellanyhome.com/local-intel/article-5-washington-county-homebuyers.html) — Canonsburg, McMurray, Cecil Twp: prices, schools, commutes, and the Southpointe factor

All articles updated quarterly with current market data.
